processes_hinted: ESRE (ethanol and stress response element) regulation

compartments.label: Lumen
compartments.snippet: Open space label top-left above intestinal cell brush border; contains green rod bacteria and P. aeruginosa.

compartments.label: Intestinal cell
compartments.snippet: Large outlined cell box with brush-border microvilli at top; contains Mitochondria and Nucleus sub-compartments.

compartments.label: Mitochondria
compartments.snippet: Organelle in center of intestinal cell; contains labels UPRᴹᵀ and mtROS.

compartments.label: Nucleus
compartments.snippet: Large oval inside intestinal cell, lower portion; contains ESRE, cellular stress response genes, antimicrobial defence genes.

genes.snippet: Blue membrane receptor on brush border, right side.
Intracellular node label TIR-1/SARM1; SARM1 is human ortholog notation.
Yellow oval labeled NSY-1 / MAPKKK in p38 cascade.
Yellow oval labeled SEK-1 / MAPKK in p38 cascade.
Yellow-pink oval labeled PMK-1 / p38 MAPK.
Blue oval labeled HSP-60; connector to/from Mitochondria, direction uncertain.
Purple box labeled ATFS-1 / ATF-4; sends solid arrow downward to ESRE/nucleus.
Purple box; receives signal from +Fe³⁺ and sends arrow downward to ESRE/nucleus.
Purple oval; receives signal from mtROS (faint/uncertain); target of downward connector also uncertain.
Purple box labeled DAF-16 / FOXO; sends solid arrow to cellular stress response genes.
Purple box labeled SKN-1 / Nrf2; sends solid arrow to cellular stress response genes.
Purple box; sends solid arrow to antimicrobial defence genes; adjacent to ROS box.
Purple box; receives downward arrow from PMK-1 and sends solid arrow into nucleus (antimicrobial defence genes).
Purple box on right side; receives signal from Translation pathway; sends solid arrow to ZIP-2.
Purple box labeled CEBP-1/2; sends solid arrow to ZIP-2.
Purple box labeled CEBP-1/2; sends solid arrow to ZIP-2.
Purple box; receives arrows from ZIP-4 and CEBP-1/2; sends arrows to ESRE (arrowhead type ambiguous) and antimicrobial defence genes.
Purple box labeled NHR-86 / HNF-4, far right; sends solid leftward arrow into nucleus (antimicrobial defence genes).

tentative_edges.snippet: Pyocyanin --> TIR-1/SARM1 --> LRO stress/pH increase --> NSY-1; solid activation arrows; LRO stress is intermediate step, NSY-1 is downstream.
Solid arrow from NSY-1 (MAPKKK) to SEK-1 (MAPKK) in canonical p38 cascade.
Solid arrow from SEK-1 (MAPKK) to PMK-1 (p38 MAPK).
Solid downward arrow from PMK-1 to ATF-7.
Upward connector from PMK-1 toward DAF-16/SKN-1/HSF-1 cluster; exact target uncertain as transcription notes ambiguity.
Solid arrow from ATF-7 into nucleus activating antimicrobial defence genes.
Faint/uncertain connector from HSP-60 toward NSY-1 region; direction uncertain (possibly Mitochondria->HSP-60->NSY-1).
Solid connector between Mitochondria and HSP-60; direction uncertain, noted as faint/ambiguous.
Solid downward arrow from ATFS-1/ATF-4 to ESRE/nucleus.
Solid downward arrow from HIF-1 to ESRE/nucleus.
Faint/uncertain downward connector from AMPK toward nucleus/HIF-1 area; exact target ambiguous.
Solid arrow from DAF-16/FOXO to cellular stress response genes in nucleus.
Solid arrow from SKN-1/Nrf2 to cellular stress response genes in nucleus.
Solid arrow from HSF-1 to antimicrobial defence genes in nucleus.
Solid leftward arrow from NHR-86/HNF-4 into nucleus toward antimicrobial defence genes; direction/sign partially inferred. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid arrow from ZIP-4 to ZIP-2.
Solid arrow from CEBP-1/2 to ZIP-2.
Arrow from ZIP-2 to ESRE; arrowhead type (activation vs inhibition) ambiguous — confidence lowered. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid downward arrow from ZIP-2 to antimicrobial defence genes in nucleus. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Downward connector from FSHR-1; exact target uncertain, noted as ambiguous. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
mtROS --> AMPK connector; faint/uncertain as flagged in transcription.
Pyoverdine --> +Fe³⁺ --> HIF-1; Pyoverdine chelates iron (+Fe³⁺) which activates HIF-1. Modeled as Pyoverdine signal via +Fe³⁺ to HIF-1. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
PCN --> NHR-86 connector uncertain; transcription notes PCN connects downward toward NHR-86/nucleus with uncertain sign. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Translation --> ZIP-4/CEBP-1/2 region connector has '?' mark noted; relationship uncertain.
